purpose.fact: The repaired detector/SAM2 rerun with association_depth_tolerance_m=1.25 completed but still failed the fixed candidate-association gate.
purpose.agent_inference: The offline diagnostic used depth_error_m, while the detector runtime associates candidates with depth_agreement_m against the selected SAM2 mask. Runtime association semantics must be frozen before trying the predeclared mask_depth_2_0_v1 fallback.

runtime_association_semantics.selected_anchor_rule: Use the same detector anchor priority as detect_postview_groundingdino_sam2.anchor_choice_key after recomputing associated_to_candidate for each projection_anchor_results row.
runtime_association_semantics.runtime_association_rule: projection_status == visible and projected_pixel_inside_mask == true and depth_agreement_m <= fixed threshold
runtime_association_semantics.reason: depth_error_m measures projected candidate point versus rendered depth at the pixel, while runtime detector association uses candidate projected depth versus selected SAM2 mask median depth.

allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.name: mask_depth_1_25_v1
allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.rule: projected pixel inside SAM2 mask and depth_agreement_m <= 1.25

allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.name: mask_depth_1_5_v1
allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.rule: projected pixel inside SAM2 mask and depth_agreement_m <= 1.5

allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.name: mask_depth_2_0_v1
allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.rule: projected pixel inside SAM2 mask and depth_agreement_m <= 2.0

allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.name: mask_only_upper_bound_v1
allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.rule: projected pixel inside SAM2 mask without depth gate

allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.name: box_only_upper_bound_v1
allowed_runtime_repair_candidates.rule: projected pixel inside detector box without mask/depth gate

not_allowed_in_this_revision: post-detector evidence aggregation before runtime association gate passes
threshold selection from evaluation labels or ObjectNav success labels
using candidate correctness, wrong-goal visit, success, GT object id, or GT goal id for action-time repair

rerun_gate.rerun_allowed_after: runtime_association_semantics_diagnostic_v1 passes minimum_runtime_repair_gate_for_rerun using a predeclared non-GT runtime variant
